calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2006 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-24-2006 Continued To Jul-17-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-25-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Trinity Capital Corp.
Order waiving live testimony at the hearing is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration of Ernest Knowles, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Northstar Carriers, Inc., and Sarwan Singh Purewal aka SS Purewal as follows:
Principal $96,753.03
Prejudgment Interest $9,676.15
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $355.50, for a total of $109,284.68
Plaintiff is entitled to the leased equipments listed in the Judgment, see scanned doc. for details.
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2006 Continued To Jun-05-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 6/5/2006 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair, CSR#1170. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2005 Continued To Mar-06-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-03-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
